Friend,

Democrats are all-in to defeat us. They are dumping historic amounts of money - HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS - into red states in order to flip the Senate majority. **Wow**.

There’s one thing I know: Senator Steve Daines and I will never stop fighting for you and our conservative values. But here’s the thing - **[we need your URGENT SUPPORT in order to fight the Left’s MASSIVE war chest.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje0UWexOSxSJ2xck5AjvGNyH6s3aKrA1trDLUivXL4geYCldXNUwKT2MkDIdg6Fji4YcLvlJQ2DyL0-VlnVber6k02JwthqUPEC2y-k10ptpgrFbvQZL1hrOH93sslWV38HD9BUaQQF7RM7P_q9cAwrnFhJvNDP_uiGtQy6u_8dXSiCJgZVANuCAQwQVctY-kkwPDUKrVD-5VHD_weN6vf_k%3D)**

We’ve reviewed the numbers, and we’re still 234 donations short of hitting our midnight goal. **[Will you contribute $5 or $10 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT in order for us to protect our Republican Senate majority?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje59s84M9LFcYaKMC1QXRdHtE85wtBoagbgmzDFkB09sb8mdGP-sI1dObToOHHK_H6A4AMsXYFBOoF7miic3DH4EjTec-TylZ4IbwERTH9QdmLmiQyC2YDX4mvD2Q2wrAaSHCUZWH-vw4rl2-87SI0IytwQhmCZk0Nsu2eGtzf2vS6S2jVfYMJ6Yl803e_CpZdMZ2ZzZDgbVgUG1Fj-VEGjU%3D)**

| [**DEFEND THE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje0DD7YoK3tc2cJk6rQkTkmA4kOI6mMyplCn-8GSHuvphezqRTYdOSESx38Pxv4dQ9i3CB_3NKLsDH2c2b80FPH4lwaDQ6sLWTcE9-4UogH3Dx7q-msxCm4PGuOljLD1B-Ri1V4iItcUAH8b4Jneg5zmpawUnWv24a4EcjY0pY-KQvxmebWtUT2EOcIstZVW78fCsZAy8cG3OrZEC3cbcxNw%3D)

This election will come down to the very last donation because every dollar you contribute will directly impact whether Senator Daines and I can fend off Obama and Schumer’s next multi-million dollar attack against us.

**[We’re counting on your support.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje3c-OkTEOWBwxL5tTCmt4Vup7OMIN7IcKNjhkOnDe_6vfbW9nkUzWohOSVXUExYaUAEq6lPdCZOI4xE2k1qFFu-nrQfPNeZ4kHQjhMzS3K8Yy2SeKo7PPwfWTIYVJ6B1heKNQKpxlCDncPihOFLYSyJBygOfBeWitcxdKzpQEvChHGXg9gNT9CwlXgFWjG_Y_qTmA4D-7UZvF_bwq6J3i5Y%3D)**

**[My opponent raised $57 million in the last three months- more than any Senate candidate in history, but I know with your contribution - of even just $5 or $10 - we can BEAT the Left, PROTECT our Senate majority, and SAVE the Supreme Court.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje0DIDNo8jh69VSMawiNsYGC-JdeuL8Z6q2mw9DOVahv9P3JYRYhLRIF7KrA0uB2F4P4Zz0Rka_4H_kvZt6rJa3_HIgHcMbzKkNeNDBDWA8y6wUnBEcDac2LxPlSOmlQQxA5mdebM_rY6cSvePZ_DmwyHU-WqZkwmMP2yX3baUewgruZJ3t5YvXLq-dAG1irfRpkDhR7QoikQOoaKJUumoUQ%3D)**

[**PROTECT THE MAJORITY AND SAVE THE SUPREME COURT ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje3qF_d2mH1Ywrelt_ZP98_fffkIKRTRT70PlcdVxsrFHu45gDK3kn2iaFD6iIRnaKuBp4L7HIQgZn7DX17NR9PGql1L4zaEUbdYa20rqdl0ffHJCZxIzwrekixxBDmpU7S_yhvomY3a7IbrmjGd3FpLem_vgh85lPGlB0wqLoxT4fh9rdohJFwnY7wWLtUGlf80GioJixKGtadNrrEKiTRg%3D)

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The contribution you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1cc0966028dc4c419a7e82b85cdeae63&_e=2aqK2sJw1aFX9D-MU-e19do0f9MV39Kb_Q3RQrijpwt1PuGtYwOj_p4MlMALixPHENZBV9RfqWydVwz8sJ7DYTepFKT0HWWUriS7I4jywAqAOH5tIKM7TH1wO26xp_1THQaI7uG2e9ddmN8TbnYMvK0-Te9szmfDcytmV7X38vpjLj7jGM6PJjFw6e9fxkrI7YxidH5YbCcvKApZNrEje-rQ3lotRIZCMRgzLYSPb6DMhnGuMQT7oZq3FjC9NA8yP0mvbAJitGmNvPke7KSj-_h-KUJ3eCdQfXyfL_ZLYAxlbcIF5jCx2kTYBG85oOqkwAeOfbSa8lyfsqzLK-aGsKIJvAxjJOv5eRuN5EcUkjrLYzvQRXalCuhG9dNgZB0TplGSx8iqJCNcKdn78BrwlVzDOEaY_eCpteC0Yxmu5xE%3D) **These races are our only chance at keeping the GOP Senate majority, so thank you for donating before it’s too late.

Why would they do this? Simple. Democrat special interest groups want Commissioners who will answer to them, not you.

_To put it as plainly as I can, they know that I won't support their job killing political agenda._

[**I'm running to give everyday, hardworking Arizonans a voice at the Corporation Commission and to fight for you.**](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=9e9b5061c9&e=66a0c3ba26) I will work tirelessly to save you money in everything I do.

_I make you this promise—YOU are my priority, nothing else._
---
|
---
|
# Early voting is happening right now!
Have you voted yet?

Arizona Democrats are out-voting Republicans 2-to-1 in some areas of the state!

Arizona Republicans, **_if you haven't already turned in your ballot please do it now and cast your vote for me and the rest of the common sense Republican team for Corporation Commission._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: Today is National Early Voting Day
body:
Go Tell Your Friends About It | | | |
---
|
---
| | | [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fcdacd3cb2&e=3f151f8b74 "CHIP IN")
---
| Friend, Today is National Vote Early Day! Why does this matter?

When Americans vote early, we can make sure that last-minute problems will not prevent us from casting our ballots – and help shorten voting lines on Election Day for everyone.

Over [200 ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a004eb42bb&e=3f151f8b74)million Americans have options to vote before Election Day with no excuse needed!

We have 10 days left until Election Day and over 50 million of us have already cast our vote. For the first time in election history, more people are expected to vote early than on election day.

We are in the home stretch to win back the White House and win critical races all across the country to regain the Senate and to keep our Democratic majority in the House. We are thankful to you for supporting us this year and if you could [chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=ab80dc993d&e=3f151f8b74) what you are able to today, it would help us keep our communication outreach going until November 3rd.

We need to amplify our voice about a progressive policy agenda for all working families and we can't do this without your support. Help us get louder these next 10 days!

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office
---

Peter,

Republicans have few offensive opportunities this year – and quite frankly, one of the best shots our Party has to flip a House seat this cycle is the seat I’m running for in Oregon.

ICYMI – _Politico_ released an article last week which really captures the mood here on the ground in Oregon: **_“senior Democrats have grown nervous and officials acknowledge the race will be closer than they’d like.”_**

My opponent recognized that I am the guy who has the best shot at sending him into retirement, so he dialed up Nancy Pelosi and asked her to send in some air support. Of course, she acquiesced, and now **our best estimates put Democrats’ total spending in this race at more than $2.6 million.** DeFazio is one of their MVPs and they’re going to do everything they can to defeat me in TEN short days.

**[I’m going to lose this race if we can’t match their spending dollar-for-dollar. Please, I too need some air support. It’s now or never.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5513d33c06674a2a8db967922570b663&_e=w5cldTRxGK_fE6wuOUagFK9RSTRk85i6k2zpnHuRnjK7NtiOlLQSl0_xzdcvoNCk5zbfW58bFek9wW2a8nvEz4W4yF433kS0zwUfNC3e9FBkTi41xYR94dVjWoMC19XrT7locQ05CUK6NqTMMbVmvuVbkKOvjdaUUnZvnqFU4qjlxDTGAhAbRIDGzrNQ1Wn6rXEGP21Rhx9gOeZ7-BSxGpSZxqUaioWRIrUTVlKxDKKhFr986X003i8ks3bi4pTAD3hiw4IemEBZE_Dbbjp5-HKYr86TPwa7qpndfQQijXon-JH-JN5eMM8YN8tS7yDC)**

| [**Donate To My Victory Fund** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5513d33c06674a2a8db967922570b663&_e=w5cldTRxGK_fE6wuOUagFK9RSTRk85i6k2zpnHuRnjK7NtiOlLQSl0_xzdcvoNCk5zbfW58bFek9wW2a8nvEz4W4yF433kS0zwUfNC3e9FA651G3m8iXuvCz5IMK964M6C3buB1Rxa83scINDcxBoY3HxAgYK7ZipLsXs-pOW_nWSoN-gN7doMfD0AY9vZRBXNxovPSG2jltaoPeHhUIJlHxrKT3kTsG4X57qrPe9mh-hF1MA6FZ2vmnojVyUbzZq9dfeNHAqCuvKXjVG5ARPG9er9V_d-ZFz6GEv_a5CEIhMaehq4EUNd7U3J5zteuk)
---

From the very beginning, this campaign has been built on the generosity of small-dollar donors, and that is how I plan to finish it. **Your support** has enabled us to nationalize this race and force Nancy Pelosi and national Democrats to spend big bucks in defense of my opponent.

We have Democrats on the run – but **my fundraising numbers seems to be stalling out at the worst possible time** ; I just checked and we’re a full $55,000 behind where we were at this point in September.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign right now to help us get back on track?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5513d33c06674a2a8db967922570b663&_e=w5cldTRxGK_fE6wuOUagFK9RSTRk85i6k2zpnHuRnjK7NtiOlLQSl0_xzdcvoNCk5zbfW58bFek9wW2a8nvEz4W4yF433kS0zwUfNC3e9FArkaU5ZK_djinqPAnbuL1MIoquYdPbOi_nGPOyuFGcLXBLp7igNR3lwvSe0OzcZXm3r1--oOyodtGdU0JyIzzetuXw4p4S82RJvEzbVlp5OaImazsIBDefNOPfXLeImVo3SoVHeicKppjo85cIOcfJ4lkUWdpSzD0JfAHythAqacQBm1gVKWpcXAs9KFGbQAxTgyhO_smJhEXWdrmg8GbG)**

[**Chip-in before Midnight** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5513d33c06674a2a8db967922570b663&_e=w5cldTRxGK_fE6wuOUagFK9RSTRk85i6k2zpnHuRnjK7NtiOlLQSl0_xzdcvoNCk5zbfW58bFek9wW2a8nvEz4W4yF433kS0zwUfNC3e9FD3cOD_ZyxhBg0XUCGkQDH6OTCzK6CUPu-eZRoB3oIu9FVOGVd5nQ1NVXpq1gVQnMA4GUhg8b-eZYzotNQvOhv7HuQPuTFJwVbyzvDMmheNU53bpDpkaZ5RfP3_NZNeXPbc7yoaQkP09ARWW2-c_NWdk6lE3w6Uu1Fh3pT1qFSC--6yWPdtlaTgFX1Nph9JZJ1kD_iTKxnZChFBoZxpTrAr)

Very Respectfully,
[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5513d33c06674a2a8db967922570b663&_e=w5cldTRxGK_fE6wuOUagFK9RSTRk85i6k2zpnHuRnjK7NtiOlLQSl0_xzdcvoNCk5zbfW58bFek9wW2a8nvEz4W4yF433kS0zwUfNC3e9FADswjHSDTdO0JZEW9gmbTpfJof9pEnjE_qSPEC1HjRYZ1z-JCH5LsFtxK98QdVL81wXMsWZtW1EjlctraPp_Ifq7lVqXwF9LYO9YnvSw9p-ZjJ3-0SOyItkrd3RTeHgl3v-M3ZwyE9Ni7Gy1eRFKw1zWhnnYVVLJ--_jHcbY3PlwylIg1IgkF495B6GplVUhXTNWBTk3XVwCPqAKZHvePB)
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It’s going to take every single one of us
body:
...but we really need YOU
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,You've seen the attacks, heard the baseless smears, and watched as they've leveled ridiculous accusation after ridiculous accusation. You know what the Democrats are capable of. And they won't stop until they've forced their radical agenda on every single one of us.That's why I'm reaching out to you today about Steve Chabot's race. His seat is CRITICAL to stopping their radical movement from infiltrating Ohio. [CHIP IN NOW TO SAVE STEVE'S SEAT >>>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-y/) You know Steve is a stalwart Republican and a fierce champion for freedom in the House. You know he has never and will never back down from a fight.And you know Nancy Pelosi has had her eye on his seat ever since Steve stood alongside me against the Democrats' sham impeachment. It's personal this time, friend, and he's in trouble.[**This is our last chance to stop Pelosi and the radical left from buying his seat and getting her handpicked liberal candidate into the House. **](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-j/) [DONTE NOW!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-t/) She's counting on you to sit this one out, friend. But you know letting Pelosi buy Steve Chabot's seat would be a great tragedy for the House and for the future of our state.[**It 's going to take every single one of us and time is quickly running out. Can we count on YOU to chip in?**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-i/)\- Congressman Jim Jordan | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujdiyhk-kujkulhluu-k/)

name: Doug Collins
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC
body:
27-27-20

Peter,
We are in the home stretch of the campaign, and the polls are consistently telling us what we already knew - we have the momentum, and we will defeat the pandemic profiteer, Kelly Loeffler, on Election Day.
Loeffler has loaned her campaign over $20,000,000, and she is getting desperate, but the conservative movement in America CANNOT become complacent. She will say anything and spend anything to win this race and stay in Washington.
To keep Republicans in the Senate Majority, we need to ensure we only elect true conservatives, and I'm the only conservative in this race.
I'm a father, husband, and patriot who has dedicated his life to serving our nation. You may know me as a conservative Congressman who served on President Trump's defense team during the Senate's sham impeachment trial in the Senate. I'm also a Lieutenant Colonel
and Chaplain in the Air Force Reserve.
Unfortunately, I don't have her resources, but I am blessed to have the support of Conservatives in America, and I need your help to keep this momentum going into Election Day!
I need every red-blooded conservative to show their support for our shared values here in the home stretch. Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $10, even just $45 could be the donation that makes all the difference in this race.

MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION

Kelly Loeffler is outspending me 52 to 1, and we are still neck and neck in the polls. Voters are seeing through her slick ad campaigns and rejecting her fake brand of politics.
We have all the momentum, but we need an EMERGENCY donation in any amount from every conservative in the nation to fight the tidal wave of cash that Loeffler and her DC Consultants are throwing at me.
Please help me keep up the momentum and win on November 3rd!
For freedom,

Doug Collins
Member of Congress (R-GA)
Republican for Senate

MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION

PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC.

subject: Getting to work

body:
On Friday, my team sent an email about Pete Sessions’ repeated attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act and strip health care coverage from hundreds of thousands of Texans. I want to reassure y’all: as your next representative I will NEVER allow that to happen on my watch.

On Friday, my team sent an email about Pete Sessions’ repeated attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act and strip health care coverage from hundreds of thousands of Texans. **I want to reassure y’all: as your next representative I will NEVER allow that to happen on my watch.** Health care is too important for our community, especially during a global pandemic. Yet, when Republicans gain power, their first thought is to their own reelection chances, then to their corporate backers, and lastly to their own party. It’s never about their constituents and it’s never about the good of the country. I’m running to change that — to bring back common sense to our Congress and a prosperous future to our community. But before I can get to work for Central Texas, I need your help to win on November 3. Can you chip in to my campaign today. name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: The time is now!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.158814.aspx)
Dear Peter,
Remember when Hillary Clinton called us "deplorable" for loving our country and supporting then-candidate Donald Trump? Now Joe Biden is calling us "chumps" for sticking with the President and refusing to support the Biden/Harris socialist agenda. If you missed it, you can check it out [here](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/46.158814.aspx)!
I'm fighting against the far left's agenda - can you help? Every dollar matters to allow me to continue representing you in Congress and keep up the fight to ensure President Trump stays in the White House. We **need** to take back the House of Representatives and your donation would help immensely!
It's time to pull on our helmets, tighten our chinstraps, take the field and refuse to lose! Get out and vote in-person and take a friend or two. Let's Make America Great Again by winning the Keystone State for our President again!
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.158814.aspx)

name: Sen. Braun (R-IN)
subject: Games with the Supreme Court
body:
the reality of the situation No images? [Click here](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xtrzhl-vkreeut-y/) The reality of the situation is this: Democrats are promising to pack the Supreme Court if they win. They are threatening to fill it with activist liberal judges. At the same time, Senate Democrats refused to show up this week to even vote yes or no on the very qualified Amy Coney Barrett. They are throwing every road block to her nomination. I look forward to voting YES on her nomination very soon. This is why this election is so important.Thank you for standing with us. Mike [DONATE: Supreme Court Fund](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xtrzhl-vkreeut-r/) MIKE BRAUN FOR INDIANA

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here by texting “ELECTION” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between October 21, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on October 29, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) night accommodations for winner and winner's guest, attendance to rally event, and ground transportation (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: These Four Are Dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Control of the Senate is up for grabs and we need to do
everything we can to keep radical progressives from winning
before they pack the Supreme Court, expand Obamacare, raise our
taxes, and take away our Second Amendment rights.

Fellow Conservative:

Control of the Senate is up for grabs and we need to
do everything we can to keep radical progressives from winning
before they pack the Supreme Court, expand Obamacare, raise our
taxes, and take away our Second Amendment rights.

These liberals are DANGEROUS - they have threatened
Republicans, sold out to China for political power, fought for
taxpayer-funded abortions, and violated our election laws.

Please help us defeat the four radical Democrats
below so they can't make it to the Senate and force their
dangerous agenda on the American people.

JON OSSOFF - GEORGIAJon Ossoff (D-GA) supported the
call to defund the police and then angrily told a group of
liberal supporters that he wanted Republicans "beaten so bad"
they can never "show their face again in public."
➤ Defeat Jon Ossoff

STEVE BULLOCK - MONTANA
Steve Bullock (D-MT) pushed a plan to offer Chinese
millionaires permanent residency in the United States if they
invested in an exclusive ski resort in Montana.
➤ Defeat Steve Bullock

GARY PETERS - MICHIGANGary Peters (D-MI) has a 100%
rating from Planned Parenthood Action Fund and has fought to keep
taxpayer dollars going to Planned Parenthood and other abortion
providers.
➤ Defeat Gary Peters

THERESA GREENFIELD - IOWATheresa Greenfield (D-IA)
has a record of violating election laws. Her 2018 campaign
manager was charged with felony election fraud for submitting
false signatures to gain ballot access, and her current campaign
was caught accepting contributions over the legal limit.
➤ Defeat Theresa Greenfield

Each of these four liberals will win if we do
nothing. Please, stand with us to ensure that conservatives win
control of the U.S. Senate.

Your support will help us push John James (R-MI),
Steve Daines (R-MT), David Perdue (R-GA), and Joni Ernst (R-IA)
on to victory.

Please help us defeat the dangerous Democrats and
elect these principled conservatives.

Time is running out, so please take action right
now.

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to help fight for conservative leadership in
Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

Support These Conservative Senate Candidates Before
It's Too Late

DONATE HERE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

Peter,
We’ve raised over $12,000 in small dollar donations so far towards our digital ad spend. We have until midnight tomorrow to put every penny we can into this and we need your help. We have so many incredible Tennessee Democrats on the ballot, and we want to do everything in our power to support them and help them get elected. Right now that means asking you for money to help us reach more voters.
Tennessee has a record number of newly registered voters this year. There may be more flippable seats than we ever thought possible. We know it’s a lot, but we want to make sure that on November 4 th we wake up feeling confident we did what we could to win this election. Can you make a donation right now? Or forward this to a friend and ask them to make a contribution. This is it. Let’s make it count!

name: John Cornyn
subject: ⚠️ Urgent Attention Needed
body:
Friend,

Did you see this?
A top Democratic super PAC just dumped almost $9 million into attack ads against me.
I haven't seen the ad yet, but I can assure you that this is not good news.
They're going to falsely attack my record and unfortunately, Friend, I can't rely on the liberal media to fact check them.
The media has proven that they're overtly on MJ's side.
That's why I am counting on YOU, Friend, to step up and have my back. That's why I am emailing you personally.
If you don't jump into action to help me counter these HUGE attacks, I'll be left all on my own. Texas will fall, and the Senate majority along with it.
**[If you act immediately, you'll unlock an exclusive 8X MATCH. %%First Name%%, I wanted to talk to you about why I'm in this fight.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ighh3MNHPD_WtDBRVTUloFWRUJ4icaHJDX3vBnE5741azkTlXRE-ujnIo-vt9Jx5cH2f38D3sU7T52OfkZmJPVEA64mxAt2rDWwURv0GQo03GobttBFOQh326ACIgTz6VLAphdOwxGqqhUtU1u4-upOoG8BY-YlEcyQ28VWEUehZ2Va0x7u-R9Ic2uw-EynpBVJMTZgbftqHLLMSkQ-9n2G7QpW1su5PWwgFuOl5076VTFVOyov0F1mJIJJBQvh0lj-Devl0nSAjMrRGuSFUgBJpkNNH4zHHUsiwyydcNuydhTEOwjo7-o3cm_xzinKczrkNF5AE8PRs9ySSPywWuM_nq0vGNUcAYNeismgEqRlQeTd7t0L67_17VkLjKUvxbbVUrK_mNeplDlD7tgu67Omy1Q3FWAAzRya_wpX9zsA=&c=fG06doYU48nh00MHNhQSZL9X6pX7_qsSegOrRNEo09_waxh2Yt7m2Q==&ch=rMxiZE_U1oP9btPWQg3X_5ie-AuSezCw0ivYVFbPzSTGM5hYfXTe-g==) Friend,

I'm the luckiest person in the world -- I've been privileged to serve my community my entire life. And I'm glad I've been able to give **SO MUCH BACK** to the country that I love.

As a child, I escaped Cuba with my family in search of a better life -- and we found that here in South Florida. **I raised a family,_children and grandchildren_ , and worked hard to achieve the American Dream.**

That's why I ran for Mayor in 2011, and that's why, as Mayor, **giving the same opportunities to the next generation has been my sole focus.**

**I 'm proud of what I accomplished:**
* I balanced a budget of %8.9 billion **8 YEARS in a ROW**
* Cut taxes by **$1,700 PER HOUSEHOLD**
* Saved the taxpayers **$400,000,000.00+** in wasteful spending
* Fought for **transparency and accountability.**

[HELP US IN OUR FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ighh3MNHPD_WtDBRVTUloFWRUJ4icaHJDX3vBnE5741azkTlXRE-ujnIo-vt9Jx5cH2f38D3sU7T52OfkZmJPVEA64mxAt2rDWwURv0GQo03GobttBFOQh326ACIgTz6VLAphdOwxGqqhUtU1u4-upOoG8BY-YlEcyQ28VWEUehZ2Va0x7u-R9Ic2uw-EynpBVJMTZgbftqHLLMSkQ-9n2G7QpW1su5PWwgFuOl5076VTFVOyov0F1mJIJJBQvh0lj-Devl0nSAjMrRGuSFUgBJpkNNH4zHHUsiwyydcNuydhTEOwjo7-o3cm_xzinKczrkNF5AE8PRs9ySSPywWuM_nq0vGNUcAYNeismgEqRlQeTd7t0L67_17VkLjKUvxbbVUrK_mNeplDlD7tgu67Omy1Q3FWAAzRya_wpX9zsA=&c=fG06doYU48nh00MHNhQSZL9X6pX7_qsSegOrRNEo09_waxh2Yt7m2Q==&ch=rMxiZE_U1oP9btPWQg3X_5ie-AuSezCw0ivYVFbPzSTGM5hYfXTe-g==) Now, I'm running for Congress **for the same exact reasons.** We must preserve the American Dream that so many feel is out of their reach. As Lincoln said, America is the world's "last best hope." _**and we can 't quit on her, not now, not ever.**_
[HELP US IN OUR FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ighh3MNHPD_WtDBRVTUloFWRUJ4icaHJDX3vBnE5741azkTlXRE-ujnIo-vt9Jx5cH2f38D3sU7T52OfkZmJPVEA64mxAt2rDWwURv0GQo03GobttBFOQh326ACIgTz6VLAphdOwxGqqhUtU1u4-upOoG8BY-YlEcyQ28VWEUehZ2Va0x7u-R9Ic2uw-EynpBVJMTZgbftqHLLMSkQ-9n2G7QpW1su5PWwgFuOl5076VTFVOyov0F1mJIJJBQvh0lj-Devl0nSAjMrRGuSFUgBJpkNNH4zHHUsiwyydcNuydhTEOwjo7-o3cm_xzinKczrkNF5AE8PRs9ySSPywWuM_nq0vGNUcAYNeismgEqRlQeTd7t0L67_17VkLjKUvxbbVUrK_mNeplDlD7tgu67Omy1Q3FWAAzRya_wpX9zsA=&c=fG06doYU48nh00MHNhQSZL9X6pX7_qsSegOrRNEo09_waxh2Yt7m2Q==&ch=rMxiZE_U1oP9btPWQg3X_5ie-AuSezCw0ivYVFbPzSTGM5hYfXTe-g==) Victory in November will take everything we have. My opponent is prepared to spend MILLIONS against our campaign, **and we have to start gaining ground against her if we stand any chance of success** \-- that starts by ACHIEVING our fundraising goal that expires in just TWO DAYS.

[**Can we count on you to join my fight for the American dream?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ighh3MNHPD_WtDBRVTUloFWRUJ4icaHJDX3vBnE5741azkTlXRE-ujnIo-vt9Jx5cH2f38D3sU7T52OfkZmJPVEA64mxAt2rDWwURv0GQo03GobttBFOQh326ACIgTz6VLAphdOwxGqqhUtU1u4-upOoG8BY-YlEcyQ28VWEUehZ2Va0x7u-R9Ic2uw-EynpBVJMTZgbftqHLLMSkQ-9n2G7QpW1su5PWwgFuOl5076VTFVOyov0F1mJIJJBQvh0lj-Devl0nSAjMrRGuSFUgBJpkNNH4zHHUsiwyydcNuydhTEOwjo7-o3cm_xzinKczrkNF5AE8PRs9ySSPywWuM_nq0vGNUcAYNeismgEqRlQeTd7t0L67_17VkLjKUvxbbVUrK_mNeplDlD7tgu67Omy1Q3FWAAzRya_wpX9zsA=&c=fG06doYU48nh00MHNhQSZL9X6pX7_qsSegOrRNEo09_waxh2Yt7m2Q==&ch=rMxiZE_U1oP9btPWQg3X_5ie-AuSezCw0ivYVFbPzSTGM5hYfXTe-g==)

Thanks for all of your help,

Carlos Gimenez

We are short $32,178 - not exactly a small number to make up, but it is absolutely vital that we get across the finish line in order to catch up with my opponent Jon Ossoff so we can stop his radical socialist agenda.

It allows our campaign to go up against the radical Left and coastal elites who are funding my opponent, Stacey Abrams 2.0- Jon Ossoff's campaign. The most recent fundraising reports show us that we are falling behind the liberals ' special interest dark money dollars, and the only way we're going to make it up is by activating the grassroots. Remember, there are only NINE DAYS before the election, and it is coming down to the final hour. == I know you won't let us down. subject: Can you pray for justice today?
body:
As a person of faith, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds right now to sign the AMY CONEY BARRETT SUPREME COURT CONFIRMATION PRAYER CARD.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativeintel.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_s=87a7e423e1d44ddc80083a0bd50b02c2&_t=IDKfNkVyDsH2H8YXsOs0tpTKj8Ke4b0lLYfwsNH6Fs_sWE13wWEbfyFRmllSUZPnGjU_IRd6y-UKqGHsx2y4MECerpFYJCVVCkD2XxGD9DutYqIqdGtEPTflu9dMBYR5UXpfceX8C0YdN2-WF0Can4IdsoRdlKl7NAQhsSfWPhXBsjLrA5zzm4JfWQDTIXTEWCu3Tg6fKBybqxEqN9AB88FNQbLdm-uZHWX8X6-WWGA%3D)
Dear Fellow American,
**[As a person of faith, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds right now to sign the AMY CONEY BARRETT SUPREME COURT CONFIRMATION PRAYER CARD.](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=87a7e423e1d44ddc80083a0bd50b02c2&_e=sDkPD_oMWt4PohJxZ5azyvLgNRwPI3_hNcf8HmzpWxhsRg3hgM_eh_sgxSErNb2Qs5sLRtVzzzM9lAl1FsQzgVgArRcV6ETG_sOkIQO6OX3ytEzMIjUtxZZNF0vNQQO04JKd21SzP2WZkf6TeAsTYTciRPmOt2EL2eMvzuva77tVkfl_LB6v17qKUezMIBkTv6Aggq4G2eg8UAnciPC6U5E1WWJNyDs_aoXXrsXFK3rrNki4weaKOcgT3AWconZtuFmeOhNsJM5WBk4tGtNQQv_ZrYcOG09r9PbhEH8E9uDF_W-EIB_QEF-838a7O8x2PkQUNamlkGL3_GEHAMWjhGqVnrqvxM-L2FK3pkxVwKEGdZYRokSjKQe7S4RUu_SHswGPfN6RSi5I1cFvWGyQSw%3D%3D)**
Just a few weeks ago in the Rose Garden at the White House, Judge Amy Coney Barrett walked up to the podium next to President Donald J. Trump to accept her nomination to the United States Supreme Court.
Not a minute later, the Godless Left began spewing condemnation on Amy _**for her faith.**_
Right now, America faces a critical question...will we stand up for religious liberty or not?
The radical Left have shown their true colors by attacking Judge Barrett for her Catholic faith alone.
This time they’re attacking a Supreme Court Nominee...but next time, friend, they could be attacking **you** or **me** for _our_ Christian Faith...
**[But by signing this prayer card...you can boldly stand up for your faith and ask our gracious Lord and Savior to strengthen Amy right now.](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=87a7e423e1d44ddc80083a0bd50b02c2&_e=sDkPD_oMWt4PohJxZ5azyvLgNRwPI3_hNcf8HmzpWxhsRg3hgM_eh_sgxSErNb2Qs5sLRtVzzzM9lAl1FsQzgVgArRcV6ETG_sOkIQO6OX3ytEzMIjUtxZZNF0vNQQO04JKd21SzP2WZkf6TeAsTYTciRPmOt2EL2eMvzuva77tVkfl_LB6v17qKUezMIBkTreRbfcTyOKPt-h83geiiLTxToY5YN4jF3e6KMABszyT0xbUnf4MDigHny1FpdJDLoB93Pmk_EbF6-BXowAwBNQMdHZflx40nc6Hx_zhBM5eOK5ECiWCCyf_oz5lleMBl9d_a5q3XNiKoSemrgybcvd4MIGxhUWHPFe6BLQNHf-YQzdL_wp-5eMhgOjT8QbU2Z--Ys7RSuvXRJRY-orm96A%3D%3D)**
Just last week, during her Supreme Court Confirmation Hearings, Judge Barrett endured a grueling series of hateful questions from the new age Left attempting to tear her down because she’s a praying American like you and me.
**They’ve attacked her family** ... outrageously calling her a “white colonizer” for adopting two children from Haiti.
**They’ve attacked her religious beliefs** ... one senator saying: “the dogma lives loudly within you”.
**And they’ve attacked her integrity** ... another senator tried to smear Judge Barrett by continuously asking her whether she had sexually assaulted anyone -- even _**after**_ Judge Barrett plainly said she had not.
These derogatory questions and comments serve no other purpose than to tear Judge Barrett down.
...she even told all of the Senators in the hearing that she’s doing her best to stay off social media because the attacks on her and her family have been so hurtful.
We need her to know she’s not in this fight alone---but that her brothers and sisters in Christ have her back.
Today I need your help as a prayer leader within your community to combat the evil opposition Amy is facing with around the clock prayer protection.
Tomorrow, on Monday, Judge Barrett will face the final Senate vote that determines whether she will be the next Supreme Court Justice. That’s why we _**MUST ACT NOW**_.
**[So will you sign this PRAYER CARD for Judge Amy Coney Barrett right now?](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=87a7e423e1d44ddc80083a0bd50b02c2&_e=sDkPD_oMWt4PohJxZ5azyvLgNRwPI3_hNcf8HmzpWxhsRg3hgM_eh_sgxSErNb2Qs5sLRtVzzzM9lAl1FsQzgVgArRcV6ETG_sOkIQO6OX3ytEzMIjUtxZZNF0vNQQO04JKd21SzP2WZkf6TeAsTYTciRPmOt2EL2eMvzuva77tVkfl_LB6v17qKUezMIBkTpogTRiz88k0LCPZSA3F1NKh6y0xF9AP8oQpAuOCEigi6nsfNGPDHGzrn3MqI68ym08K-noNom5th3R2Az_hRJLwq3NCgrXgXP0ZiysznIi5t4mHSny1rWHh3OZ5-848bagJKYZrMJNs9DLvQTkiVt_qNz-y6jj7zwGWxTMi9if-EvbYE25Fjv2i61f7JFsIOHxeZ_zMZIaJHn3lQ1Yzh4g%3D%3D)**
The simple truth is, now more than ever our country needs a Conservative, Pro-Life, pro-religious liberty Justice on the Supreme Court --- and that’s **_exactly_** who Amy is. Friend, our Constitution is clear:
_“No religious test shall ever be required as a qualification to any office...”_ _- Article VI, U.S. Constitution_
If the radical Left had their way, Amy’s faith would be a **_disqualification_** for serving on the Supreme Court.
We’re praying that Amy Coney Barrett will be quickly confirmed and that her faith will be an example to Christians all over the world.
_“For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes, to the Jew first and also to the Greek” – Romans 1:16_
We must remember that God’s word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. As believers we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to:
* Grant Amy Coney Barrett boldness and strength to glorify God through the persecution she is going to endure (1 peter 4:16).
* Remind Amy that she is blessed in Christ even when her enemies persecute her and utter all kinds of evil against her falsely on Christ’s account (Matthew 5:10-11).
* Ensure that justice will prevail during Amy’s confirmation hearings and that she will be vindicated (Psalm 94:15).
* Grant Amy courage and wisdom in the face of threats and intimidation from her enemy’s evil snares (Psalm 110:1-2; Ephesians 6:13).

**[Will you join us right now and pray with boldness for Amy?](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=87a7e423e1d44ddc80083a0bd50b02c2&_e=sDkPD_oMWt4PohJxZ5azyvLgNRwPI3_hNcf8HmzpWxhsRg3hgM_eh_sgxSErNb2Qs5sLRtVzzzM9lAl1FsQzgVgArRcV6ETG_sOkIQO6OX3ytEzMIjUtxZZNF0vNQQO04JKd21SzP2WZkf6TeAsTYTciRPmOt2EL2eMvzuva77tVkfl_LB6v17qKUezMIBkTZAWH6-xoh73ib3yNY85m1Sb28RUqXXZPnCXVReSnP7HtjAKEr05VHA4t26tSrBjPUWiL6kREq-xBk0CnbWvExfwCDV6dLGkLMoRkPk5rb74Qmn44FSzavtXBtbElvGHkO1eosOZxusJYysKHq5WGJus2Kbd8sqOsx7NZjm8Qn1Qb32MMUK0qUvLU2AaFiyd-B3AAOB6XYubbpKVGYG8Faw%3D%3D)**
My name is David Kubal and I’m blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA).
Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders.
Specifically, we desire to reach Christians in churches and communities nationwide with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer.
That’s exactly why I’ve written directly to you today.
**[And it’s also the reason I’ve included this link to the special personal PRAYER NOTE FOR JUDGE AMY CONEY BARRETT.](http://links.conservativeintel.com/u/click?_t=06987e4dc3184376a5094bb3854429ac&_m=87a7e423e1d44ddc80083a0bd50b02c2&_e=sDkPD_oMWt4PohJxZ5azyvLgNRwPI3_hNcf8HmzpWxhsRg3hgM_eh_sgxSErNb2Qs5sLRtVzzzM9lAl1FsQzgVgArRcV6ETG_sOkIQO6OX3ytEzMIjUtxZZNF0vNQQO04JKd21SzP2WZkf6TeAsTYTciRPmOt2EL2eMvzuva77tVkfl_LB6v17qKUezMIBkTzekNyag2ryIlxOwSgTFcBaikAy65Wdpp-Jc_6sm_AhChpjQoWVbpWOY_nI0nFxZc8sKbgJ2hN1dNWhWzuyPL0cWz1no6Lm8jme7x2r7wmeSlG0vWw3GfkQSCounaSR9pVYy755cbJ5bcEHUjgmG0B_oU-Xej8URpBuKFQW1tF_PS8OudNTZbinD-yD14vgMq_28uUIJ3gmkA_7GnOUJcEQ%3D%3D)** I’m counting on you to step-up, take action, and join your brothers and sisters in Christ as together we lift up Supreme Court nominee Amy Coney Barrett to our Lord and Savior.
As Amy’s enemies ramp up their attacks—we must also ramp up our efforts to cover her with prayer.
So that’s why, before Amy’s final Senate confirmation vote tomorrow, our goal is to collect **100,000** personal _**PRAYER NOTES FOR JUDGE BARRETT.**_

clean_body: As a person of faith, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds right now to sign the AMY CONEY BARRETT SUPREME COURT CONFIRMATION PRAYER CARD. Dear Fellow American, Just a few weeks ago in the Rose Garden at the White House, Judge Amy Coney Barrett walked up to the podium next to President Donald J. Trump to accept her nomination to the United States Supreme Court. Not a minute later, the Godless Left began spewing condemnation on Amy for her faith. Right now, America faces a critical question...will we stand up for religious liberty or not? The radical Left have shown their true colors by attacking Judge Barrett for her Catholic faith alone. This time they’re attacking a Supreme Court Nominee...but next time, friend, they could be attacking you or me for our Christian Faith... Just last week, during her Supreme Court Confirmation Hearings, Judge Barrett endured a grueling series of hateful questions from the new age Left attempting to tear her down because she’s a praying American like you and me. They’ve attacked her family ... outrageously calling her a “white colonizer” for adopting two children from Haiti. They’ve attacked her religious beliefs ... one senator saying: “the dogma lives loudly within you”. And they’ve attacked her integrity ... another senator tried to smear Judge Barrett by continuously asking her whether she had sexually assaulted anyone -- even after Judge Barrett plainly said she had not. These derogatory questions and comments serve no other purpose than to tear Judge Barrett down. ...she even told all of the Senators in the hearing that she’s doing her best to stay off social media because the attacks on her and her family have been so hurtful. We need her to know she’s not in this fight alone---but that her brothers and sisters in Christ have her back. Today I need your help as a prayer leader within your community to combat the evil opposition Amy is facing with around the clock prayer protection. Tomorrow, on Monday, Judge Barrett will face the final Senate vote that determines whether she will be the next Supreme Court Justice. That’s why we MUST ACT NOW. The simple truth is, now more than ever our country needs a Conservative, Pro-Life, pro-religious liberty Justice on the Supreme Court --- and that’s exactly who Amy is. Friend, our Constitution is clear: “No religious test shall ever be required as a qualification to any office...” - Article VI, U.S. Constitution If the radical Left had their way, Amy’s faith would be a disqualification for serving on the Supreme Court. We’re praying that Amy Coney Barrett will be quickly confirmed and that her faith will be an example to Christians all over the world. “For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes, to the Jew first and also to the Greek” – Romans 1:16 We must remember that God’s word instructs us to pray regularly for our leaders. As believers we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to: Grant Amy Coney Barrett boldness and strength to glorify God through the persecution she is going to endure (1 peter 4:16). Remind Amy that she is blessed in Christ even when her enemies persecute her and utter all kinds of evil against her falsely on Christ’s account (Matthew 5:10-11). Ensure that justice will prevail during Amy’s confirmation hearings and that she will be vindicated (Psalm 94:15). Grant Amy courage and wisdom in the face of threats and intimidation from her enemy’s evil snares (Psalm 110:1-2; Ephesians 6:13). My name is David Kubal and I’m blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA). Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. Specifically, we desire to reach Christians in churches and communities nationwide with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer. That’s exactly why I’ve written directly to you today. I’m counting on you to step-up, take action, and join your brothers and sisters in Christ as together we lift up Supreme Court nominee Amy Coney Barrett to our Lord and Savior. As Amy’s enemies ramp up their attacks—we must also ramp up our efforts to cover her with prayer. So that’s why, before Amy’s final Senate confirmation vote tomorrow, our goal is to collect 100,000 personal PRAYER NOTES FOR JUDGE BARRETT. Can I count on yours to be included today? Please know that you’re helping build a community of faithful Americans praying for Supreme Court Nominee Barrett during this trying time. Together we will help Amy stand strong in her faith and be confirmed for the Supreme Court by getting millions of Americans praying. Thank you for being a prayer warrior I can count on. May God bless you, David Kubal President & CEO, Intercessors for America (IFA) 1 Timothy 2:1-2 “I urge, then, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercession and thanksgiving be made for all people—for kings and all those in authority, that we may live peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness” Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting. © 2020 Intercessors for America | P.O. **As support for the confirmation of Judge Barrett amongst Americans continues to rise, Senate Republicans need your support now more than ever. **

As we've seen over the last couple of weeks, Judge Amy Coney Barrett is an exceptionally qualified jurist with rave reviews from her colleagues, students and the wider legal community. She has a strong record of upholding the Constitution and has proven to be one of the most brilliant legal minds in our nation today.

But none of that matters to the radical Left. Instead, they choose to focus on her Christian faith, the only thing they can "attack" HER over. Instead, they dragged her through their grandstanding on subjects completely irrelevant to the qualifications of the nominee before the committee.

_**Stand with Amy Coney Barrett and Senate Republicans, and get your piece of history before we run out!**_

name: Trump Jobs
subject: Trump Needs You For 1 Week - Travel Required!!
body:
|
|
---
____
Stampede America has partnered with the Trump Campaign to deploy a Strike Force of Trump Supporters who can travel to Michigan or Pennsylvania for one week to knock on doors and mobilize conservatives to vote. Michigan and Pennsylvania are both within the margin of error which means President Trump can win these states again!

Strike Force members will receive compensation of $25-$35/hr plus travel and hotel stipends.
| [Sign Up To Deploy!](https://stampedecampaings.com/stam/index.php/campaigns/yl470dt76ddca/track-url/pt474o9lkkf4f/9a817587e4b5cf97cdc54c2e032d6739f2c6b9f1)
---
Please join your fellow patriots and help President Trump win these two critical battleground states.

The future of the country is at stake.

Holly Turner

PS: The top 100 canvassers will be entered for a chance to win a trip for two to President Trump's Second Inaugural Ceremony in Washington, DC.
Stampede America is a group of conservatives activists across the nation who engage voters on important issues in local, state, and federal elections and government.

Our purpose is to help America’s conservative voices be heard, to maximize the positive impact they can have on our country and culture, and to push back against the fake news and professional misinformation campaigns run by liberals.

clean_body: The senate majority comes down to Maine == Dear Friend, I wanted to give you a quick update on the status of my campaign. We are entering the final days of this race and I need all hands on deck. We only have 9 days to reach undecided voters in Maine and I need YOU to help my team do that. One of my most important advertising deadlines is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT. It is absolutely critical that my team can get up with new television ads to fight back against my opponent and her allies' absurd attacks. == == The Far Left will not stop during these final days and neither can we. It is CRITICAL that we raise enough funds before my ad buy deadline tomorrow. == Thanks for everything, Susan Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. Box 1096 Bangor, ME 04402 == | | Collins for Senator | PO Box 1096, Bangor, ME 04402 | | Sent by mailto:action@collinsin2020.org powered by

name: Team Steel Alerts
subject: Friend, Pelosi will win unless...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
We are doing everything we can to keep up with the Far Left's attacks. But Nancy Pelosi continues to funnel MILLIONS of dollars into this race -- $5.7 from her PAC alone -- and dark money groups are spending more attacking us than they're spending in any other race in the nation.

.

Friend, we are doing everything we can to keep up with the Far Left's attacks. But Nancy Pelosi continues to funnel MILLIONS of dollars into this race -- _$5.7 from her PAC alone_ \-- and dark money groups are spending more attacking us than they're spending in any other race in the nation.

Right now, we aren't doing enough to fight back against the lies, mistruths, and deceits. Currently, this race is still a TOSS-UP, but with the Democrats massive cash advantage Pelosi is poised to buy this seat out from under us.

**We need your help to fight back.**

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c114/3144535114/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Mark Warner is working hard in the Senate to make life better for _every_ Virginian. Our team will continue to send these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with Mark's priorities.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* Mark announced his intent to **[vote against Judge Amy Coney Barrett's nomination](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c113/3144535114/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wsls.com/news/local/2020/10/22/virginia-senators-kaine-warner-condemn-upcoming-supreme-court-vote/")** for the Supreme Court. It is clear that the Affordable Care Act is on the line with this nomination, and Mark will continue to work to protect coverage for those with pre-existing conditions.

* **[Mark's bi-partisan _IMPROVE Well-Being for Veterans Act_ has been signed into law.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c112/3144535114/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-measure-aimed-at-reducing-military-veteran-suicide-signed-into-law/")** This legislation will provide funding for critical mental health resources for veterans, as a way of addressing the epidemic of veteran suicides.

* Supporters across the Commonwealth weighed in on the reasons they support Mark Warner. They cited his diligence in **[strengthening our national security,](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c111/3144535114/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.fauquier.com/opinion/letter-sen-mark-warner-and-two-definitions-of-intelligence/article_f3dd1c32-0d77-11eb-b682-e705f5ce1c61.html") [his willingness to work across the aisle to solve problems,](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c110/3144535114/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.princewilliamtimes.com/opinion/letter-re-elect-u-s-sen-mark-warner/article_33c97402-130a-11eb-b567-af0f9eaae00e.html")** and **[his work to build an economy that works for all Virginians.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c11f/3144535114/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.winchesterstar.com/winchester_star/letter-to-the-editor-what-a-vote-for-warner-means/article_934228da-d423-5fc6-bc2c-451f5b8e3420.html")**

* Mark warned of foreign efforts to influence American elections in a bi-partisan joint statement with Senate Intelligence Committee Acting Chairman Marco Rubio. Mark will continue to speak out about the spread of misinformation online and work to ensure that our elections are fair and free of foreign intervention.

* Mark continues to lead the charge to make sure everyone has access to quality, affordable, health care. Joined by his Senate colleagues, **[Mark asked the Department of Health and Human Services and the Department of the Treasury to research the impact of repealing the Affordable Care Act.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c11e/3144535114/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-pushing-administration-on-potential-impact-of-aca-cuts/")** If struck down by the Supreme Court, more than 20 million Americans could lose access to health care.

* Election Day is nine days away. Whether you plan to vote early in-person, mail in a no-excuse absentee ballot, or vote in-person on November 3rd, the first step is visiting **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c11d/3144535114/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")** to make your plan to vote.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c11c/3144535114/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201025_e_1_fl__901__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c11b/3144535114/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0e/53d9897e/557b7fdd/1c88c11a/3144535114/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Join The Conversation Tomorrow
body:
Simona Grace with Nithya Raman about Moms in Politics | | | |
---
| [RSVP](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5f34482d05&e=3f151f8b74 "RSVP")
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, I want to personally invite you to (virtually) meet an LA City Council candidate that I am extremely excited about: [Nithya Raman](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fb3301b818&e=3f151f8b74). Nithya is a Harvard and MIT-trained urban planner, who has worked on urban poverty issues her whole life, in both India and the U.S. She co-founded SELAH, a homeless services nonprofit, and most recently was Executive Director of Time’s Up, advocating for safe and equitable workplaces in the entertainment industry. Nithya is running for the seat of District 4 on a platform of ending homelessness, racial justice, enacting a People’s budget, and winning a Green New Deal for LA. She has the expertise and integrity to address our city’s housing and climate crises and has a track record of getting things done by bringing people into a movement. We would love to invite you to a small group meet-and-greet Zoom with Nithya, where you can learn about the movement to turn the LA City Council into the most progressive in the country. You’ll also be able to ask questions yourself. It will be at [date/time] and you can RSVP[ here](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b2df5759ad&e=3f151f8b74). There is no charge for entry to this event, and we hope that if you like what you hear you will generously spread the word on Nithya’s behalf so the campaign can bring their people-powered movement to City Hall. Joining us as special guests to talk about the national importance of local and state elections, Jennifer McClellan Virginia State Senator, and Kristine Reeves for Washington State Rep. If you'd like to [donate](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=351d2fe1c1&e=3f151f8b74), you can do so here

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

---
| [Chip In](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1a90e5d9df&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip In")

* A new poll shows that Black support for Democrats has **collapsed by a massive 11 points** since 2016,

For generations, Democrats have demanded Black votes. All they've given us in return is poverty, blight, corruption, and hopelessness. name: Mark Warner
subject: FW: My husband Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | How are you doing, Derek?

I'm just reaching out to make sure you saw this message from my wife. Re-reading this, I remember the pit in my stomach as we watched the election returns in 2014, realizing that it would be a closer race than we thought. I'm determined to make sure that doesn't happen again this year, which is why Lisa reached out last week.

We can do this, but we could use your support to make sure we bring home a win and keep Virginia blue.

If you'd like to chip in, here's the donation link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-octmm](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da10/53d9897e/557518f7/1c88c17a/3028290068/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-octmm?refcode=20201025_f_2_nd__903__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We've got less than 10 days to go -- let's go out and win this thing.

-- Mark Warner
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Lisa Collis**
Subject: My husband Mark
> Friend,
>
> I remember those nerve-wracking moments, sitting with my husband Mark as the results rolled in on election night 2014. That race was a lot closer than anyone anticipated -- Mark won by less than 1%. We all know the stakes are even higher this year, and that's why I'm asking for your help in these final weeks before Election Day.
>
> As we all face this pandemic together, I know Mark is the public servant Virginia needs right now. As Governor, and now as Senator, I've watched him navigate tough negotiations through difficult days to make life better for Virginians. If there's a way for Mark to solve a problem or help folks in need, it's just about impossible to get him off the phone until it's done. I'm a little biased, but I think that's the kind of leadership that we need now more than ever.
>
> These are challenging times, but my husband still believes there are brighter days ahead for our country and our Commonwealth. That's Mark. Always thinking about the future and trying to bring people together around the things that unite them.
>
> With so much at stake in this election, we can't afford to take anything for granted. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, so I'm asking for your help to make sure we re-elect Mark, keep Virginia blue and flip the Senate.
>
> **[Will you make a donation to help keep Mark in the Senate, serving Virginians?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da10/53d9897e/557518f7/1c88c179/3028290068/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-octmm?refcode=20201025_f_2_nd__903__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
>
> Thank you for your support.
>
> -- Lisa Collis

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da10/53d9897e/557518f7/1c88c178/3028290068/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-octmm?refcode=20201025_f_2_nd__903__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

---
Families throughout our city rely on the dependable, affordable energy that our energy workers and their employers produce.
---
Despite how much we all depend on our oil and gas sector, my opponent continues to try and cripple the industry and fire the millions of workers who fuel it.
---
With our livelihoods at stake, Houston simply cannot afford another term of Lizzie Fletcher.

clean_body: Our families can’t afford Lizzie Fletcher | Friend, My Democrat opponent Lizzie Fletcher’s record on the energy industry speaks for itself. Despite promising voters in 2018 that she’d protect our valuable energy jobs, she... ❌ Allowed Nancy Pelosi to STRIP funding for Houston’s energy sector ❌ Supports limiting the transportation of natural gas ❌ Voted for the principles of the job-killing Green New Deal This is why she doesn’t want to face me on the debate stage. She doesn’t want you to hear about her job-killing record after voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. But we will hold her accountable in just 9 DAYS by choosing to send someone else to Congress who will ALWAYS put Texas FIRST. ** A major portion of the Houston citizens Lizzie Fletcher claims to represent work in our vital oil and gas industry. Families throughout our city rely on the dependable, affordable energy that our energy workers and their employers produce. Despite how much we all depend on our oil and gas sector, my opponent continues to try and cripple the industry and fire the millions of workers who fuel it. With our livelihoods at stake, Houston simply cannot afford another term of Lizzie Fletcher. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Final chance to get our common-sense message out |
---

| |
# _Please_ Help Us in the Final Stretch

We are sorry to bother you on a Sunday, but, we are quickly approaching our last chance to purchase advertising before the home stretch to election night.

_We need to place TV and Radio ad buys for the week by the end of the day on Monday_ (Tomorrow night). Any donation is meaningful. $75 may help get us another radio spot, $25 will help push digital ads, and, if you can, $360 can help us pay for another TV spot, $100 can help with our final "Get Out The Vote" push. It all helps. **Even $5 can help with postage for a final mail push.**

Donate Here. >>> **[Donate](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=560385ef39&e=a212bb87cc "Donate") <<<**

[Troy's campaign](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=832b9ce710&e=a212bb87cc) has been about common-sense solutions to help create more options and better prices on health insurance and prescription drug prices. Consumer protection and activism isn't just about holding bad actors accountable, it's also about _bringing more insurance companies into the state to compete for your business. _

[Troy's campaign](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=83dbfd8c36&e=a212bb87cc) is about true stewardship with our public lands, supporting access, protecting what we care about, supporting farmers and ranchers, and funding education.

There are still a few hundred thousand ballots out there that haven't been returned, please help us get our message to these voters.

Thank you!

-Team Downing

It all helps. Even $5 can help with postage for a final mail push. Donate Here. >>> "Donate" <<< has been about common-sense solutions to help create more options and better prices on health insurance and prescription drug prices. Consumer protection and activism isn't just about holding bad actors accountable, it's also about bringing more insurance companies into the state to compete for your business. is about true stewardship with our public lands, supporting access, protecting what we care about, supporting farmers and ranchers, and funding education. There are still a few hundred thousand ballots out there that haven't been returned, please help us get our message to these voters. [**Endorse Nancy and donate**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=894334858f8e4ca1920c1bc9de95dc3e&_e=2WMIgcZsUl62N9obuIGN72UVWJYGDWUteUTGKYIIjtyy7azcPec9l46FxlbN9LATGkNKScgCqB0ZWKAl-3bLD76ZdiuhAqpGZhUQxitQYoD2ZLtwU9HMrhzaiLP4oqxDP0PZ9nxoG-h22QuQ3Z9ITYS6cFcP2qd4qep0EOio83asDx8Ezm3nFw0vLcRlBSwYK12jspIF1DjmQYnaLVoRX-ffepbwiZHoWpA-0lwSb9sdyQucFdv0sUEyAKe3fe3v5EsNvylYYAUkrPtLFUQTmvOIdTVU0sQ-NqP-a1lpTRu4Ilzx8uvw-LcIMrak0mNj2aPHzEffpAHZmMIocA8NneOg9B9fgyQSPa-zD_BGG24IPuwuDFC3eMRVE43FmRG-sO7RBO7sKSR9USnl_DbonyQssJbN-cjzdjJWBWOdPDdahuzwS8whI15odCNrhLMG28MN8pyAP51C3PJu4YJUvj2Lvk744BbJC_HnU5Gebbo%3D) The men and women in law enforcement put their lives on the line every single day to keep us safe, and they count on public officials to have their backs. **_“I want to thank you for being the rare few who choose to keep us safe by running towards danger, rather than away from it. And I stand with you and I have signed the police pledge stating the following: that a lawful society free from mob rule and violent insurrection is not possible without our law enforcement, that police officers have chosen a noble profession.”_** _** \- Nancy Mace**_ We’ve seen too many politicians abandon our police officers when the going gets tough and turn their back on them for political gain.
**Friend, that’s not Nancy. **
She will always be there for our men and women in blue. We cannot let lawlessness, violence, and chaos dominate our communities and our streets.
Nancy stands with law enforcement because they will always answer the call when our communities are in danger. We’re honored to have the support of those who keep us safe, and Nancy will always fight to make sure they have the resources they need. **_“When we call 911, we want to ensure that we have the resources for law enforcement or police officers to take the call. As your Congresswoman, I will never cower to a violent mob, and I will never kowtow to the fringe wing of either party...We will never allow for the destruction of property to be unchecked in our streets and the same for violence.”_** **_\- Nancy Mace_** Will you join the FOP in supporting Nancy’s campaign? Friend,

**I debated Joe Biden for the FINAL TIME.**

This debate will go down in HISTORY. I showed the American People what's at stake this Election Day: _America's future will either be bright and continue on the path to greatness, or it will spiral down into socialism and decline at the hands of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris._

All three of these women running in Iowa have some of the closest races across the entire country. That's why we're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer again for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the critical resources needed at this final stage of the election.
Massive amounts of national donor groups are flooding Iowa with dark money in an effort to dominate the airwaves in the final weeks of the election.

**[Donate whatever you can so we can work together to build a united, blue Iowa.](https://act.myngp.com/el/t4JbVs6KypDdq9c33MmPEna4IHw0I82QBcP3tEqnKNs=/X7XrO0Zabdwj-u7wCQdJysrNQjM1f0EppnjmayqqHco=?refcode=201025-email-pm)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Trump attacked me while in Arizona this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends -- I'll make this quick. Donald Trump and my opponent just attacked me at their rally in Arizona this week. They're desperate and will say anything to try to win Arizona.
We don't know what else they'll say before Election Day, but here's what I know: Before I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution.
As a senator, I'll take that oath again and be an independent voice for Arizona and the country.
I think that's what we need right now: senators who will do what's right -- not what's politically expedient or what will score political points.
It's clear this country needs new independent leadership.
[**If you agree, will you split $3 between my campaign and Maggie Hassan? Let 's work together over these final 9 days to get the job done.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6c7/2a380d31/206cb4f9/f0495a/3129071734/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNV9td2g0a2VsbHlfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201025_mwh4kelly_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for staying in the fight,
-- Mark

| Friends, In case you missed it, last week the UNH survey center released a poll showing that the race for the NH State Senate is too close to call**.** We are VERY close to winning back a Republican Majority and the Democrats know it -- and they're getting desperate. **My race in District 8 is going to be one of the _tightest, most heavily contested _State Senate races, not only in New Hampshire, but in the entire country. **If we want to win back the majority, we need to hold this seat! That's why I am asking for your help. Will you help me fight back against the Democrats' negative, attack ads during the closing week by chipping in $10 or $25 to my campaign? >>>[Follow this secure link to donate online to my campaign! ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTQwMDAxMTg4MjY5NzkwNDIyJmM9azRnMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00Mzg3OTE3NjEmZD1kOGswaTdo.LxT8Gx3VgBcIc9QD5wzvM15n2IRYPkuFKTF8cXwpsC8)
The Democrats have gone all in on my race. Last week, my opponent, Jenn Alford-Teaster, _DOUBLED_ her advertising buy locally. **She is an ultra-liberal that supported Elizabeth Warren in the Presidential Primary and is now trying to portray herself as a "moderate." ** She has managed to raise a lot of money from Hollywood elites and New York City liberals -- while my donations have all come from good Granite Staters like you.****

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: How far we’ve come
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/iBftNGOqYRhKKupJAzAARpMOhcTS5O16VgEbyFjVyuM=/lWyC5iAM7ritRwvprQD1nrWUqc1jke9AApL8vzwHF9w=?refcode=102520SMH)
| | Friend, We are only nine days away from the end of the 2020 election cycle. As you know based on our early voting numbers, the election is very much underway. This is far and away the most important election of our lifetime, and we have an incredible opportunity in the next few days to set the course of our state and restore decency in our country. For four long years we have watched Donald Trump rip apart our country. For the first two years of his presidency, the Minnesota Legislature was controlled by Republicans who followed his lead, putting forth legislation meant to divide us. We cannot go back to where we were in 2016. Since DFLers took back the Minnesota House, we have protected health care for 1.2 million Minnesotans, passed the strongest wage theft law in the country, guaranteed Minnesotans access to affordable emergency insulin, made strong investments in our schools, and passed the largest jobs and infrastructure investment package in state history. What we are doing here today is bigger than just winning or losing a House seat or being right about an issue, it's about saving lives and the soul of our nation. We need your help. If you are able, please consider investing in our campaign today. Candidates all across the state could also use your help making phone calls and turning out the vote in this last stretch of the campaign. _ _ [**Contribute**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iBftNGOqYRhKKupJAzAARpMOhcTS5O16VgEbyFjVyuM=/lWyC5iAM7ritRwvprQD1nrWUqc1jke9AApL8vzwHF9w=?refcode=102520SMH) [**Volunteer**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iBftNGOqYRhKKupJAzAARpMOhcTS5O16VgEbyFjVyuM=/D7E1_Ljxk9dWDDkXFutgZ86vpYDzESBzbgnPUFDhDVw=) There is so much on the line, and I am incredibly proud of the work you are doing. We are in a strong position heading into the final week, but we can't take our foot off the gas just yet. Polls are tightening and we need to do everything we can to protect and expand our majority. With your help, we can win this. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iBftNGOqYRhKKupJAzAARpMOhcTS5O16VgEbyFjVyuM=/lWyC5iAM7ritRwvprQD1nrWUqc1jke9AApL8vzwHF9w=?refcode=102520SMH)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: One million COVID-19 tests, Job opportunities, and a Halloween contest
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a recap of the announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015yNnHYCrRAgTVFIN_EO-Mzzav33oQ9RUUgYmpIUzdbI8SUP5SL5KM1Yz1kmy4s8-NhC7ffXQyouNvxwCxepL1baB2U-iFJDwXHDowLHMocmHBas5aK9wPHJTFUcL-nVc-HT8zFWia1sHA5QywnqjCb_W0dwQzywOxA5hOncxJEpyzxDgDjeYHPA4rs5yWKWkPmc1pMUw1nCk6cnF1xWo-3UxFdndUo9aUufKuyYStyl6Gkgnw2l3o6XP3Qwk4EMH9h0BzgdLgmaDMw1WF9E8cgzzUgoHL0ZHSy-L8bfTsldYgTyzDggf58B5ygy2w85FdNGbFY-r1T8=&c=RIaHKTkt6YPRjWYs5rV-OBbh9X1TyqkZ1BAvOwomIVOkw3jlULzsTQ==&ch=LAgFEwADFx07pZQ8X_jR7kQdOgC3DeqIL8Ui9sTPL3eqoaz92S6b7A==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
ONE MILLION COVID-19 TESTS
We reached a milestone this week in our state's response to COVID-19: we've run our one millionth test.

It took us nearly six months from our first case to reach 500,000 tests, and it's only taken us another two months to reach 1,000,000. Because of this unprecedented testing effort, we've been able to quickly identify and isolate positive cases. That's more important than ever right now, as our cases are increasing and we're at a crucial crossroads in combatting this virus. If we recommit ourselves to the 3Ws: wearing a mask, watching our distance and washing our hands, and get tested frequently -- even if we don't have any symptoms -- then we can stem the tide of our rising case numbers. It won't be easy, but I know that we can do it together.
| | |
---|---
|
JOB OPPORTUNITIES

This November, in partnership with Google and the tech-for-social-impact nonprofit Research Improving People's Lives, we're launching a Virtual Career Center and a first-of-its-kind Artificial Intelligence-powered job-matching tool to help Rhode Islanders who are out of work.

Right now, if you visit [BackToWorkRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015yNnHYCrRAgTVFIN_EO-Mzzav33oQ9RUUgYmpIUzdbI8SUP5SL5KM40IdO0Zxw0rBJ9Mcfdb0htqaimiH15Y86RT0Rki9rAd9JJ3_FSRuurnjSYI28paF1uoGeP2Qjc-WtoH5k8jmUKpYT8O1N6rXw==&c=RIaHKTkt6YPRjWYs5rV-OBbh9X1TyqkZ1BAvOwomIVOkw3jlULzsTQ==&ch=LAgFEwADFx07pZQ8X_jR7kQdOgC3DeqIL8Ui9sTPL3eqoaz92S6b7A==), you can search and apply for 100+ job openings and more than a dozen job training programs that have already been created through Back to Work. You can also chat with "Skipper" - our new virtual assistant - and complete a career recommendation assessment, where you fill out information about your skills and interests to receive personalized notifications when there are job openings that might be a good fit.
| | |
---|---
|
SAFE & SPOOKY HALLOWEEN CONTEST

This week, the Rhode Island Department of Education and the Rhode Island Foundation launched the Safe & Spooky Halloween Contest. We're challenging all Rhode Island students to share how you'll be celebrating Halloween while following our public health guidance. We've already heard so many creative ideas, from building slides out of PVC pipe to hand out candy safely, to organizing virtual pumpkin carvings. We'll pick the twelve students with the most creative ideas who will each receive a cash prize of $50, thanks to the generosity of the Rhode Island Foundation.

Submit your ideas on [back2schoolri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015yNnHYCrRAgTVFIN_EO-Mzzav33oQ9RUUgYmpIUzdbI8SUP5SL5KM81RBRQRnQ_xKVMlpcootLIVhWak43Oskura4LcZ12W7VgS0sBgeOMPkUjM7SrAbCOrSSkPTMA9VMQxR1HP5_yisf1m_OtIHtQ==&c=RIaHKTkt6YPRjWYs5rV-OBbh9X1TyqkZ1BAvOwomIVOkw3jlULzsTQ==&ch=LAgFEwADFx07pZQ8X_jR7kQdOgC3DeqIL8Ui9sTPL3eqoaz92S6b7A==) by Tuesday, Oct. 27th at 4 p.m. to enter the contest!
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stays engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015yNnHYCrRAgTVFIN_EO-Mzzav33oQ9RUUgYmpIUzdbI8SUP5SL5KM1Yz1kmy4s8-oi6RUT75IvG3Cuk3B6El9YYITFe31TdQHsV94tERL7cIiMs9TP2hXpbcqQIg4yS9p8LZoHZ3tcwvaHM4GvgUmrdEcpCC424B692BuT-dNGTQE9tvHhksg0a8cKqRA1LRUDkiEnyjNJ9vVj_DirIieJECAtlu0OvpiQKo3uYRTDKcDkxoh9mfqaH0qfcMNj-te0rmi37BP5spy-I-ZDKHsSG8BJcNULHt0VPhy0d4wy90Ql9jMrjUFSYkB6iX8LB1QCdN06HFd74=&c=RIaHKTkt6YPRjWYs5rV-OBbh9X1TyqkZ1BAvOwomIVOkw3jlULzsTQ==&ch=LAgFEwADFx07pZQ8X_jR7kQdOgC3DeqIL8Ui9sTPL3eqoaz92S6b7A==).

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a recap of the announcements from the past week. If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: ==. The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19. | | | ---|--- | ONE MILLION COVID-19 TESTS We reached a milestone this week in our state's response to COVID-19: we've run our one millionth test. It took us nearly six months from our first case to reach 500,000 tests, and it's only taken us another two months to reach 1,000,000. Because of this unprecedented testing effort, we've been able to quickly identify and isolate positive cases. That's more important than ever right now, as our cases are increasing and we're at a crucial crossroads in combatting this virus. If we recommit ourselves to the 3Ws: wearing a mask, watching our distance and washing our hands, and get tested frequently -- even if we don't have any symptoms -- then we can stem the tide of our rising case numbers. It won't be easy, but I know that we can do it together. | | | ---|--- | JOB OPPORTUNITIES This November, in partnership with Google and the tech-for-social-impact nonprofit Research Improving People's Lives, we're launching a Virtual Career Center and a first-of-its-kind Artificial Intelligence-powered job-matching tool to help Rhode Islanders who are out of work. Right now, if you visit ==, you can search and apply for 100+ job openings and more than a dozen job training programs that have already been created through Back to Work. You can also chat with "Skipper" - our new virtual assistant - and complete a career recommendation assessment, where you fill out information about your skills and interests to receive personalized notifications when there are job openings that might be a good fit. | | | ---|--- | SAFE & SPOOKY HALLOWEEN CONTEST This week, the Rhode Island Department of Education and the Rhode Island Foundation launched the Safe & Spooky Halloween Contest. We're challenging all Rhode Island students to share how you'll be celebrating Halloween while following our public health guidance. We've already heard so many creative ideas, from building slides out of PVC pipe to hand out candy safely, to organizing virtual pumpkin carvings. We'll pick the twelve students with the most creative ideas who will each receive a cash prize of $50, thanks to the generosity of the Rhode Island Foundation. Submit your ideas on == by Tuesday, Oct. 27th at 4 p.m. to enter the contest! | I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stays engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19.
