name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: So, actually, we can win
body:
In 2018, I was organizing with the LaSalle County Democrats and watching closely the races all around us. From our HQ in Ottawa, | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4f269c036b86/so-actually-we-can-win?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
In 2018, I was organizing with the LaSalle County Democrats and watching closely the races all around us. From our HQ in Ottawa, we were deploying volunteers all over the county, but as Election Day got closer, it became really clear where the Congressional action was taking place -- in IL-6 and IL-14 -- the seats now held by Sean Casten and Lauren Underwood, respectively.

**Here in the district, that energy is exactly what our race feels like this cycle.** There’s that same electricity, the same calls from reporters and others asking, tentatively, “What’s going on out there?”

And the numbers back it up: **early voting numbers are staggering.** There are 4,000 people who’ve already cast their ballots in IL-16 who didn’t vote in 2018. We have 11,000 people who’ve applied to vote by mail who are brand-new voters.

And twice last week, our team made more than 2,000 voter calls.**In a day.** Overall, we called well more than 10,000 voters.

In this era of campaigning during COVID, I myself called 447 voters yesterday. I’ve transitioned many of my hours on the phone with donors to hours on the phone with voters. It’s rewarding and it’s what is going to win us this election.

I raise about $300/hour when I’m on “call time,” those hours whiled away talking to strangers on the phone. Theoretically, the fundraising time lost this weekend is roughly $3600 -- **can we raise that with this email?? **

[Pitch in and help me free up more time to talk to voters](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ca23214b06&e=140a9b81e7) (_and get elected so we can pass the kind of campaign finance reform that is clearly so urgently needed!_).

Thanks,
Dani
---
| [Chip in $16](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=62becce5b0&e=140a9b81e7 "Chip in $16")

name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: Thank you!
body:
Hi everyone, I hope you've had a good week. Yesterday I had the honor of seeing Vice President and Dr. Biden speak at my alma mater, Dallas
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/b8NLXb2dd/c?w=iq8M5ld-sBTlTC3Um9CXvETOCgVQVDZiTSQcvs45QkE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby9iOE5MWGIyZGQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone, I hope you've had a good week. Yesterday I had the honor of seeing Vice President and Dr. Biden speak at my alma mater, Dallas High School. It was an even greater honor to have the Vice President [mention me in his speech](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/b8NLXb2dd/c?w=7wb-KMjhLKD6dV-wb70zriUiOcDGcaMhroFGkZjVqgE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy55b3V0dWJlLmNvbS93YXRjaD92PUFuTnp5c0l0TTY4JnQ9MTA1bTEwcyIsInIiOiJhZWVhOWE3My1jZGE0LTRmZDYtNjM2NC1kMDRiMDVhZGJkN2MiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ), which is a moment that I will remember with immense pride. They both gave inspiring addresses that filled me with excitement and hope for the future of our country - exactly what we need to power through this final stretch of the campaign.
---
|
---
| | With just 9 days left until the election, this final week is going to be pretty busy. I wanted to take a moment to dedicate today's newsletter to YOU and to thank all of you for everything you've done to support me and our campaign. We could not have come this far without your help and encouragement. To our Campaign Co-Chairs, I am so grateful for your knowledge and experience as I navigated this election as a first-time candidate. I have been so lucky to have your guidance and advice. Thank you to our County Chairs and Committees who have supported us in so many ways - from sending postcards, doing lit drops, promoting our events, spreading the word and donating to help fund our efforts. Some have said that having 15 counties in a district makes for a big challenge, but you all have made it a blessing by amplifying the campaign with your energy and support, and making us 15 times stronger. Also, a huge thank you to my fellow candidates and their teams for being such great collaborators. Working with each other, learning from each other and supporting each other has made each of our campaigns that much stronger. I am honored to share the ballot with you. To everyone who has volunteered their time to advise me on policy, make phone calls, send postcards or write letters to the local newspaper, I cannot thank you enough. Your efforts have empowered our grassroots campaign and spread the word to thousands of voters in our district. And a special thank you to everyone who has donated to the campaign. Your contributions have helped us to buy yard signs, to print and send literature, and to advertise on the radio, online and in newspapers. From the beginning, we made the decision to not take corporate or special interest money, so we've relied on your support to make this campaign happen. To my intrepid campaign team, I am humbled that you have believed in me and given so much of yourselves to our effort. Your faith in our message and your positive energy have powered us through an uphill climb and we are almost at the finish. To my family and all of my friends who have given a ton of encouragement, support and time to the workings of this campaign - I am truly blessed and grateful for each and every one of you. Finally, to my wife (and co-campaign manager, website designer, graphic designer, speech coach, wardrobe consultant and strategist) Gulshan - thank you for coming on this journey with me. You have been the engine driving this campaign, and I could not have done any of this without you. This campaign was never just about winning an election. It's been about stepping up to the challenge of this moment in history and changing the course of the future for the better. We have already set our communities and our country on a better course. Our work doesn't end in 9 days - this is just the beginning. This is our moment. The future starts now. With gratitude,Lee

It was an even greater honor to have the Vice President , which is a moment that I will remember with immense pride. They both gave inspiring addresses that filled me with excitement and hope for the future of our country - exactly what we need to power through this final stretch of the campaign. | | | With just 9 days left until the election, this final week is going to be pretty busy. I wanted to take a moment to dedicate today's newsletter to YOU and to thank all of you for everything you've done to support me and our campaign. We could not have come this far without your help and encouragement. To our Campaign Co-Chairs, I am so grateful for your knowledge and experience as I navigated this election as a first-time candidate. I have been so lucky to have your guidance and advice. Thank you to our County Chairs and Committees who have supported us in so many ways - from sending postcards, doing lit drops, promoting our events, spreading the word and donating to help fund our efforts. Some have said that having 15 counties in a district makes for a big challenge, but you all have made it a blessing by amplifying the campaign with your energy and support, and making us 15 times stronger. Also, a huge thank you to my fellow candidates and their teams for being such great collaborators. name: Joe Collins
subject: Stick with me, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Joe Collins For Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: BREAKING: Pat Earns Major Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
As your next Congresswoman, I look forward to working with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to bring Dignity and Justice for All. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f0d948c426&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1b04f341cf&e=5886ca081d)
---
|

Dear Friend,

I am writing to you this evening with big news to share. Vice President Joe Biden, the Democratic nominee for President of the United States, has endorsed me for Congress in Indiana’s 2nd District.

**_“I am proud to endorse Pat Hackett for Congress. Pat is an attorney, teacher, and small business owner who has been serving the people of Northern Indiana for decades. Pat is committed to education, healthcare, and science to move our nation forward. Now more than ever, we need leaders like Pat in Congress to fight for a better future for Hoosiers and all Americans."_**

---
| [JOIN BIDEN / HARRIS / HACKETT](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d2fb1f5166&e=5886ca081d "JOIN BIDEN / HARRIS / HACKETT")
---
|
I have a tremendous amount of respect for Vice President Biden, whose character and experience will unite our country in this extraordinarily challenging time. Vice President Biden has a proven track record of leadership, competence, compassion and putting the well-being of others before himself. He is well known for the ability to reach across the aisle in order to improve the lives of all Americans.

Vice President Biden and I share a commitment to ensuring that no matter their background, all Americans deserve a fair shot. Vice President Biden is running for President in order to rebuild the middle class and ensure all Americans are treated with dignity. The Biden/Harris administration is committed to ensuring that every American has access to affordable health care, to "building back better" an economy that works for everyone, and to defeating COVID-19 to save lives and give our country a path forward.

---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=03597c117f&e=5886ca081d)
---
[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ca87ed7a97&e=5886ca081d)
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c0de166faf&e=5886ca081d)
---
[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=39f9685d2c&e=5886ca081d)
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=267a823c11&e=5886ca081d)
---
[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=96d5d70b87&e=5886ca081d)
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

I am very honored to accept the endorsement of Vice President Biden for the 2nd U.S. Congressional District of Indiana. I am particularly grateful, because I know that Joe Biden and I share a commitment to Dignity and Justice for All, not the few.
As a people-powered campaign, [**I need you**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c276a495e9&e=5886ca081d). Vice President Biden and I are counting on your vote. I also need your financial support to continue messaging through Election Day. [**This is an absolutely critical time to reach as many people in this district as possible.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=227bb27583&e=5886ca081d) As your next Congresswoman, I look forward to working with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to bring Dignity and Justice for All.

Gratefully,
Pat

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
